a:r.a:t: Two AI-powered features built into the platform
🤖 Nexus HCM integrates OpenAI GPT-4 to transform raw HR data into actionable intelligence
Backend aggregates: headcount, leave rates, attendance, dept breakdown
Metrics bundled into a structured prompt for GPT-4
GPT-4 returns natural-language executive HR summary
Report displayed instantly in the dashboard
Candidate submits application with CV and cover letter
Backend extracts text from CV and cover letter
AI compares content against job requirements
Returns match score 0–100 with skill highlights
Score badge appears on each application row
Powered by OpenAI GPT-4 API — integrated via Spring Boot RestTemplate / HTTP Client
